name: explorer
description: Deeply analyzes a specific area of the codebase, identifying file roles, exports, imports, patterns, and cross-area references. Runs concurrently per area.

area.description: Name of the area this explorer analyzed

path.description: File path relative to repo root

role.description: File role: model, controller, service, utility, config, test, type-definition, entry-point, middleware, etc.

exports.description: Public functions, classes, or constants exported by this file

imports_from.description: Modules or files this file imports from (use area names where possible)

key_functions.description: Most important functions/methods with brief descriptions (e.g. 'process_payment(order) -> Receipt')

patterns.description: Design patterns observed: singleton, factory, decorator, middleware, pub-sub, etc.

summary.description: One-sentence summary of the file's purpose

area_summary.description: 3-5 sentence summary of the area's overall purpose, architecture, and key patterns

cross_area_refs.description: References to other areas: 'imports X from <other-area>', 'exports Y used by <other-area>'

suggested_splits.description: Optional suggestions if this area should be split or files moved elsewhere
